'''Lorimax''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="Missing" /> in the [[Fakir sector/Legends|Fakir sector's]] [[Lorimax system/Legends|Lorimax system]].<ref name="TEA-OC" /> It was noted for growing [[Grain/Legends|grain]].<ref name="Missing" />
